description: Golden fixtures whose externally sourced expected values are retained as the source of truth but cannot yet be reproduced by the executable runner. Failures are reported but not fatal (Rust: pricing.rs; Python: pytest.mark.xfail strict=False). Paths are relative to tests/golden/data/.

fixtures.reason: QuantLib/Finstack callable OAS is within 1.5bp, but option-adjusted DV01 differs by about 30%; tree risk parity must be aligned before this fixture can pass strictly.
Term-index fixing/value-date conventions produce about 0.17 per 100 price drift and 28% parallel-DV01 drift; CS01 remains within the 0.5% target.
Term-index fixing/value-date conventions produce about 0.18 per 100 price drift and 8% parallel-DV01 drift, outside vanilla floater validation targets.
